overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through Night City's neon-lit downtown district at dusk. The character navigates busy sidewalks, crosses streets with futuristic traffic, and passes through corridors of intense pink and teal neon lighting while the Arasaka tower looms in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated city sidewalk with traffic barrier and neon skyline

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along elevated sidewalk beside busy traffic, observing the neon-lit cityscape and Arasaka tower ahead

notable_agents.action: futuristic sedan with glowing taillights driving along the road parallel to the sidewalk

entered.detail: concrete and metal barrier separating pedestrian walkway from vehicle traffic with red reflective strips
cluster of futuristic high-rise buildings covered in neon signage and holographic advertisements
tall corporate building with distinctive red Arasaka logo visible against the dusk sky
tall palm trees lining the street beyond the traffic barrier
large floating digital advertisement displaying animated content

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a futuristic city sidewalk at dusk, with the camera following a character walking beside a metal traffic barrier. Futuristic vehicles with glowing lights pass by on the left, while neon-lit skyscrapers and the iconic Arasaka tower dominate the skyline ahead. Pedestrians walk in opposing directions, and holographic billboards float above the street, creating a dense cyberpunk urban atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: street crossing under elevated highway with waterfront promenade

events.description: waits at crosswalk as large black delivery truck passes by on the left
crosses street and transitions from traffic-side sidewalk to waterfront promenade area

agents.ego_description: pauses at crosswalk to let traffic pass, then crosses the street moving toward the waterfront promenade

notable_agents.action: large black delivery truck driving past the crosswalk, temporarily blocking the view

entered.detail: massive concrete pillar supporting the elevated highway structure overhead
bright orange automated vending kiosk with illuminated product display
metal safety railing along the edge of the waterfront promenade
futuristic bench with glowing teal neon light strips underneath
bold yellow zebra crossing lines painted on the asphalt

segments.scene_description: The character moves under an elevated highway structure, navigating around a large support pillar. After waiting for a black truck to pass, they cross a yellow-striped crosswalk and enter a waterfront promenade area. An orange vending machine and teal illuminated benches mark the transition to this new zone, while the sky becomes partially obscured by the overpass above.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront promenade with neon benches and holographic advertisements

events.description: ambient lighting shifts to intense pink and magenta neon as character passes under illuminated structures

agents.ego_description: walking along the waterfront promenade, passing pedestrians and illuminated benches while neon lights reflect off the wet pavement

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in bright orange coat walking ahead, creating a visual focal point

entered.detail: elevated walkway or bridge structure with intense pink and purple neon lighting underneath
floating digital billboard displaying animated commercial content
modern skyscraper with reflective glass windows showing neon reflections

segments.scene_description: Walking along the open waterfront promenade, the character passes teal neon-lit benches and holographic advertisements. The environment transitions from mixed lighting to intense pink and magenta neon as they approach an illuminated overhead structure. The Arasaka tower shifts to the left side of the frame while modern glass buildings reflect the vibrant neon colors on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit intersection with crosswalk markings and dense commercial signage

events.description: crosses wide intersection with WAIT X WAIT text markings visible on the ground
character slows pace and turns slightly left while navigating through denser pedestrian cluster near crosswalk

agents.ego_description: navigating through a busy intersection, crossing over marked crosswalk while avoiding other pedestrians and observing traffic

notable_agents.action: futuristic white sedan waiting at the intersection for pedestrians to clear

entered.detail: yellow painted text reading WAIT X WAIT on the asphalt crosswalk
tunnel or underpass entrance illuminated with blue neon lighting
bright red and white illuminated sign for a street-level commercial establishment

segments.scene_description: The final segment features the character navigating a busy intersection with prominent WAIT X WAIT crosswalk markings. The lighting shifts between pink neon overhead and blue neon underpass illumination. The character slows and turns while crossing, sharing the space with other pedestrians and waiting vehicles. Dense commercial signage and the approaching blue-lit underpass create a visually intense conclusion to the walk.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dense urban corridor that transitions from a bustling city sidewalk into a sheltered waterfront promenade. It begins by trailing a character walking beside a metal traffic barrier, with glowing futuristic vehicles passing by and the Arasaka tower looming over a skyline filled with holographic billboards. As the character moves forward, the open city view narrows and the lighting shifts while they navigate under the heavy concrete of an elevated highway structure. After pausing for a black truck to pass, the camera follows the character across a yellow-striped crosswalk, moving past an orange vending machine and teal illuminated benches as the scene opens into the promenade area.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-drenched urban promenade that transitions into a dense, high-traffic city intersection. It begins along an open waterfront, passing teal neon-lit benches and holographic advertisements as the lighting shifts from a mixed palette to intense pink and magenta hues. As the character approaches an illuminated overhead structure, the Arasaka tower drifts to the left of the frame while modern glass buildings on the right reflect the vibrant surrounding colors. The scene then opens into a busy intersection marked by prominent WAIT X WAIT crosswalks, where the illumination fluctuates between pink overhead lights and the blue glow of an approaching underpass. Finally, the camera slows and turns amidst a crowd of pedestrians and waiting vehicles, moving deeper into a visually intense corridor of dense commercial signage and blue-lit architecture.
